General.Name: CMBC Capital Holdings Ltd
General.Description: CMBC Capital Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides loan financing services primarily in Hong Kong. It operates through Securities, Fixed-Income Direct Investment, Other Investment and Financing, Asset Management, Corporate Finance and Advisory, and Others segments. The company offers brokerage, securities margin financing, and securities underwriting/placing services; and invests and trades in fixed-income and equity securities, bonds, and funds, as well as provides money lending and loan financing services. It also provides asset management services; sponsorship, corporate financing, financial advisory, and financial arrangement, as well as client referral services; and futures and option dealing services. The company was formerly known as Skyway Securities Group Limited and changed its name to CMBC Capital Holdings Limited in May 2017. CMBC Capital Holdings Limited was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong. CMBC Capital Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of CMBC International Investment Limited.
General.Address: One Exchange Square, Central, Hong Kong
